title: News & Events | National Institutes of Health (NIH)
content: News & Events Recent News Releases NIH-funded AI model predicts cancer survival from single-cell tumor data April 21, 2026 — Study links specific cell populations to patient risk in melanoma and liver cancer. Dr. Jonathan M. Green selected as CEO of the NIH Clinical Center April 21, 2026 — The NIH Clinical Center is the largest research hospital in the world. NIH-funded breakthrough shrinks CRISPR for precision delivery in the body April 13, 2026 — Smaller gene-editing system could expand treatment options for cancer, ALS and other diseases. For the Media Media Inquiries Submit an interview request or request for comment. Images and B-roll Visit the NIH Flickr site to view free-to-use NIH health research images, b-roll, infographics, and videos. Calendar of Events NIH Institute-sponsored or related events held at or near NIH's Bethesda, Maryland, campus or online. NIH on Social Media A listing of social media, multimedia, and outreach pages from across NIH’s institutes, centers, and offices. NIH News Publications NIH News in Health A monthly newsletter of practical consumer health news and information based on NIH research. NIH Research Matters A weekly update of research advances from the National Institutes of Health. This page last reviewed on July 29, 2025
